inputs.titre: Sac de Thessalonique par les Goths

reason: The image depicts a chaotic urban scene resembling the sacking of Thessalonica. Warriors in chainmail and helmets wield iron weapons. The architecture seems consistent with the early medieval period, with wooden buildings and a walled city in the background. The dark and atmospheric painting style fits the description. No obvious anachronisms are immediately apparent. The inclusion of a domed building in the background is somewhat questionable for the 10th century but not a definitive disqualification. Overall, the image appears reasonably accurate for the event described.
